title: Quick-fix Earthly Flax Eggs Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy Filipino dish featuring flax eggs that are dense and perfect for a meal on-the-go, suitable for nut-free diets.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat. Add vegetable oil and swirl to coat.
Add finely chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet. Sauté until onions are translucent, about 3 minutes.
In a mixing bowl, lightly beat flax eggs with a pinch of salt and pepper. Pour beaten flax eggs into the skillet evenly.
Stir gently for about 1-2 minutes or until flax eggs start to set on top.
Add chopped tomatoes to the skillet and let cook for an additional minute.
Pour in soy sauce, ensuring it is well mixed with the flax egg mixture. Toss to combine thoroughly.
Remove from heat immediately. Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
